messages.content: You are a history instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
Did Marco Polo introduce pasta to Italy?

This is a modern myth. Marco Polo did not introduce pasta to Italy; Mediterranean pasta-like foods predate him. Label as mythologized history.

中文：馬可波羅將麵食傳入意大利是現代迷思，並非可靠史實。
